title: Elastic Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2025 Financial Results
text: Elastic Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2025 Financial Results. Q4 FY2025 Financial Highlights: Total revenue $388 million, 16% year-over-year growth. Elastic Cloud revenue $182 million, 23% year-over-year growth. Non-GAAP diluted earnings per share $0.47, beating consensus of $0.37 (27.03% surprise). Customer Metrics: Customers with $100k+ ACV totaled 1,510, up from 1,460 in Q3 FY25. Strong customer expansion with healthy net expansion rate. Fiscal Year 2025 Performance: Full-year revenue $1.483 billion, 17% year-over-year growth. Non-GAAP operating margin 15% for Q4 and full-year. Adjusted free cash flow margin 19% for fiscal year 2025. Cash generation supporting 60% completion of $500 million share repurchase program. Forward Guidance Commentary: Management approaching FY26 guidance with prudence due to macro uncertainty. Despite strong Q4 performance, acknowledging potential headwinds. U.S. public sector spending pressure noted as headwind. Enterprise and commercial segments showing continued strength. Strategic Positioning: Management noted the company had a strong Q4 despite public sector pressure. Guidance reflects balance between positive demand signals and macro uncertainty. Company well-positioned for accelerating growth as AI adoption increases.
